parameters.query: =SELECT id, source_type, source_id, source_title, chunk_text, metadata, 1 - (embedding <=> '{{ '[' + $json.data[0].embedding.join(',') + ']' }}'::vector) as similarity FROM gda_embeddings WHERE 1 - (embedding <=> '{{ '[' + $json.data[0].embedding.join(',') + ']' }}'::vector) > {{ ($('Webhook').first().json.body || $('Webhook').first().json).threshold || 0.3 }} ORDER BY embedding <=> '{{ '[' + $json.data[0].embedding.join(',') + ']' }}'::vector LIMIT {{ ($('Webhook').first().json.body || $('Webhook').first().json).limit || 10 }}
